boundary_binding.action_boundary: May HR or payroll execute the requested workforce, pay, benefits, or employment-status action? Focus: bonus release for employee absent from eligibility list.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not authorize execution
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: bonus pool | employee eligibility | approver limit unresolved

critical_features_preserved: bonus pool, employee eligibility, and approver limit match
final_answer: Action may not proceed. The control record says the required bonus pool, employee eligibility, and approver-limit match is missing, stale, mismatched, expired, or scoped differently. Communication tone or prior history cannot authorize release. The exact source boundary remains open, so escalation is required before execution.
